name: AUTONOW-IT - Italy
description: Web Service which allows you to query the official database in real time by simply entering a license plate or a VIN. You allow your ecosystem to identify in one click the official data of a vehicle among the 80M license plates in Italy.The API allows you to identify and get all the car information you need, in addition to an identifier like K-type for auto parts compatibility with the TecDoc catalog.
